turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Hi, I'm calling to check on the status of my refund.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Let me look... it seems the request wasn't submitted on our end.

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: What? I called twice already. This is getting ridiculous.

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Forget it — you're all incompetent and I'm done wasting my breath on you people.
